understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to reach the goal gem tile marked '+' in each level, avoiding spikes and using clicks to remove breakable blocks as needed, within a limited turn and attempt budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal only (MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT). After a move, gravity pulls the character vertically in the current gravity direction (which appears to be upward in this part of the level, as y increases downward but I needed to fall toward higher y to progress). Spikes ('u'/'v') cause immediate failure. Breakable blocks ('x') can be removed with CLICK [x,y]. UNDO can reverse the last action. The corridor scan and landing previews show where moves will end up, including passages to different y-levels.
